pages.text: Zama has spent all morning in a mucky puddle, making a new friend.

blocks.text: Zama has spent all morning in a mucky puddle, making a new friend.

pages.text: “Let’s have some fun, Mud. What do you want to do?” “Something naughty,” grins Mud.

blocks.text: “Let’s have some fun, Mud. What do you want to do?”
“Something naughty,” grins Mud.
SQUELCH!
WHEEEE!

pages.text: “Oh no, Mud! You made Mama’s clean sheets dirty!”

blocks.text: “Oh no, Mud! You made Mama’s clean sheets dirty!”

pages.text: “Zama! What have you done to my washing?” “It’s not me, Mama. It’s Mud!” cries Zama.

blocks.text: “Zama! What have you done to my washing?”
“It’s not me, Mama. It’s Mud!” cries Zama.

pages.text: “Mud! What did you do to Mama’s clean floor?” But Mud ignores Zama and scampers into the kitchen.

blocks.text: “Mud! What did you do to Mama’s clean floor?”
But Mud ignores Zama and scampers into the kitchen.

pages.text: “Zama! What is this mess?” “It’s not me, Mama. It’s Mud!”

blocks.text: “Zama! What is this mess?”
“It’s not me, Mama. It’s Mud!”

pages.text: Oh dear! Is there anything Mud didn’t touch?

blocks.text: Oh dear! Is there anything Mud didn’t touch?

pages.text: “It’s Mud, Mama!” pleads Zama. “I don’t know how to stop it!” “Enough nonsense, Zama! Get in the bath. Right now!”

blocks.text: “It’s Mud, Mama!” pleads Zama. “I don’t know how to stop it!”
“Enough nonsense, Zama! Get in the bath. Right now!”

pages.text: Zama sinks into the bubbles. It feels so good to be clean again! But where is Mud?

blocks.text: Zama sinks into the bubbles. It feels so good to be clean again!
But where is Mud?
Suddenly...
KER- SPLASH!

pages.text: “Zama! The bath is full of mud!” “I know, Mama,” says Zama crossly. “And it can stay there!”

blocks.text: “Zama! The bath is full of mud!”
“I know, Mama,” says Zama crossly. “And it can stay there!”
